entries.title: Boundary + Integration hardening
entries.purpose: Harden runtime boundary checks and complete graph/runtime integration seams for TLS recommendation signals.
entries.what_it_builds: Boundary contract checks, integration seam map, runtime-safe signal handoff records.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents authority leakage and avoids runtime regressions while TLS signals retrieve into downstream systems.
acceptance_criteria: All boundary checks block cross-owner writes.
Integration seams include explicit fail_closed stop reasons.
Runtime handoff emits deterministic signal record.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step bundle limited to boundary checks and integration handoff artifacts.

entries.title: Ranking Trust calibration
entries.purpose: Calibrate ranking trust so recommendation ordering stays robust under adversarial and sparse evidence inputs.
entries.what_it_builds: Trust calibration profile, ranking sensitivity matrix, deterministic tie-break policy.
entries.why_it_matters: Reduces unstable ranking drift and prevents stub fallback reappearing during low-evidence runs.
acceptance_criteria: Ranking variance remains within bounded threshold across replay fixtures.
Stub fallback path stays disabled when integrated signals exist.
Tie-break behavior is deterministic for equal scores.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single ranking-calibration prompt with fixed fixture inputs only.

entries.title: Action Layer recommendation packaging
entries.purpose: Package TLS recommendations into operator-readable action proposals without owner-authority language.
entries.what_it_builds: Action proposal schema, recommendation rationale packet, bounded confidence bands.
entries.why_it_matters: Improves operator retrieve speed while keeping TLS recommendation-only behavior explicit.
acceptance_criteria: Every recommendation includes evidence links and confidence band.
No action packet includes owner-authority vocabulary.
Action proposals remain read-only with no runtime side effects.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt limited to schema + packet output.

entries.title: Control Integration owner-safe bridge
entries.purpose: Connect TLS recommendation outputs to control-plane inputs via owner-safe translation boundary.
entries.what_it_builds: Owner-safe bridge contract, field mapping rules, fail_closed guard on disallowed keys.
entries.why_it_matters: Allows downstream control systems to retrieve TLS context without TLS crossing authority ownership.
acceptance_criteria: Bridge strips owner-authority keys before handoff.
Schema validation fails closed on unknown authority fields.
Output remains recommendation-only artifact.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt covering map rules then guard checks.

entries.title: Learning Loop feedback assimilation
entries.purpose: Assimilate post-run feedback into TLS weighting inputs with deterministic replay compatibility.
entries.what_it_builds: Feedback assimilation ledger, bounded weight update policy, replay-linked learning record.
entries.why_it_matters: Improves recommendation quality while preventing uncontrolled model drift.
acceptance_criteria: Weight updates include replay-linked lineage markers.
Learning loop blocks when required eval coverage missing.
Updates remain within configured bounded delta.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt with deterministic fixture replay.

entries.title: Drift Detection signals
entries.purpose: Detect recommendation drift across runs and emit actionable drift alerts for operator review.
entries.what_it_builds: Drift signal extractor, threshold profile, retrieve-ready drift report artifact.
entries.why_it_matters: Catches ranking regressions early before degraded outputs affect operator workflows.
acceptance_criteria: Drift report emits deterministic severity bands.
Drift check blocks on stale or missing baseline.
Alert payload excludes owner-authority fields.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt for drift extractor and report.

entries.title: Dataset + Eval Governance alignment
entries.purpose: Align TLS datasets and eval contracts with governed coverage requirements.
entries.what_it_builds: Dataset registry link map, eval case matrix, fail_closed missing-coverage gate.
entries.why_it_matters: Prevents unverified learning changes and maintains trustworthy recommendation outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Every dataset source maps to at least one eval case.
Coverage gate fails closed on missing eval map entries.
Governance map includes deterministic version markers.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt limited to mapping + coverage checks.

entries.title: Operator Intelligence summarization
entries.purpose: Provide operator-focused TLS intelligence summaries with confidence and risk framing.
entries.what_it_builds: Operator intelligence summary artifact, confidence explainers, retrieve filters.
entries.why_it_matters: Improves operator usability without introducing dashboard assumptions or hidden logic.
acceptance_criteria: Summary is artifact-only and dashboard-agnostic.
Every insight links to source evidence artifact.
Confidence ranges are explicit and bounded.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt generating read-only summary artifact.

entries.title: TPA input context signals
entries.purpose: Add read-only TPA context annotations and explicit observation input fields for owners.
entries.what_it_builds: Policy signal annotation schema, observation input shape, blocked-key guardrail.
entries.why_it_matters: Lets owners retrieve policy context while preventing TLS from acting as policy owner.
acceptance_criteria: TPA input context fields accept owner input but do not execute control actions.
Unknown observation input keys fail closed.
Policy annotations remain read-only metadata.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt for schema then guard validation.

entries.title: Simulation harness for TLS scenarios
entries.purpose: Run deterministic simulations for edge-case and adversarial TLS recommendation scenarios.
entries.what_it_builds: Scenario simulation harness, synthetic stress fixtures, simulation outcome artifact.
entries.why_it_matters: Validates recommendation stability before broad operator use and prevents regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Simulation suite includes adversarial and sparse-input cases.
Outcomes are deterministic across replay runs.
Any severe instability blocks next roadmap step.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: Single prompt for deterministic simulation run.

entries.title: Final Outcome OS integration
entries.purpose: Complete TLS integration into final operator system flow as recommendation input only.
entries.what_it_builds: Final OS handoff map, runtime compatibility checklist, fail_closed readiness record.
entries.why_it_matters: Ensures TLS value is available in the final operator flow without authority leakage.
acceptance_criteria: Final handoff includes explicit recommendation-only boundary note.
Runtime compatibility checks pass across integration fixtures.
Fallback paths require explicit visible marker and fail_closed default.
entries.safe_prompt_scope: 2-step prompt covering handoff mapping and compatibility checks.
